_comment: Offline news fixture: primary wire + reprint share independence; supplier claim.

articles.title: FerroGrid signs iron powder supply with PureChitin Bio
articles.body: FerroGrid Power signed a multi-year supplier agreement with PureChitin Bio for food-grade iron powder feedstock used in porous iron electrodes for multi-day grid firming modules.

articles.title: LongHaul Energy pilots hundred-hour iron-air with utilities
articles.body: LongHaul Energy is piloting hundred-hour depth-discharge iron-air modules for regional utility grid firming and dispatchable firming contracts using reversible iron oxidation.
